description:
Gets a public release with the specified release ID.

> [!NOTE]
> This returns an `upload_url` key corresponding to the endpoint for uploading release assets. This key is a hypermedia resource. For more information, see "[Getting started with the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/getting-started-with-the-rest-api#hypermedia)."

200.description: **Note:** This returns an `upload_url` key corresponding to the endpoint for uploading release assets. This key is a hypermedia resource. For more information, see "[Getting started with the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/getting-started-with-the-rest-api#hypermedia)."
